zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Hoo於1448年出生在英國英格蘭素瑞加頓時，她的父親Thomas Hoo the Elder53歲，母親Eleanor Welles24歲。她於1465年與Roger Copley在英國素可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1535年在英國藍卡爾維騰書勞享年88歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Hoo于1448年出生在英国英格兰素瑞加頓时，她的父亲Thomas Hoo the Elder53岁，母亲Eleanor Welles24岁。她于1465年与Roger Copley在英国素可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1535年在英国藍卡爾維騰書勞享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hoo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Chi, Wai Lam, Wing, Beng, Chin, Gan, Hing, Hui, Kee, Lai, Lai Ching, Mei-Mei.
variant Romanization of the surname   Hu  .

variants.name: Hu
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Ming, Ping, Bin, Yi, Ying, Jing, Xiao, Qi, Yan, Chi.  Korean Chang, Chung, Min, Yiping, Chong, Chul, Hu, Jung Soo, Sang Hoon, Tian, Wook, Yiming.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 胡, a term referring to the ethnic minorities in ancient northern and western China: (i) from Hu (胡), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Henan province) during the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771 BC ). After it was annexed by the state of Zheng (located in present-day Shaanxi and Henan provinces) in the 26th year of the reign of King Ping of Zhou (died 720 BC ), people from the fief adopted 胡, the name of the state, as their surname. (ii) from Hu (胡), the name of a state (located in present-day Anhui province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu in the 15th year of the reign of Duke Ding of Lu (ruler of the state of Lu, reigned 509–495 BC ), people from the fief adopted 胡, the name of the state, as their surname. (iii) from the personal name of Hu Gong Man (胡公满, Duke Hu of Chen), the posthumous title of Yu Man. He was given the fief of Chen (located mainly in present-day Henan and Anhui province) by King Wu of Zhou (c. 1087–1043 BC ). (iv) from the personal name of Hu Guang (胡廣), who changed his original surname 黃 to 胡 during the Eastern Han dynasty (25–220 AD ). (v) from the Hu Gu (胡骨) or He Gu (纥骨) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their surname to 胡 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534 AD ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 扈, meaning ‘retinue’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from Hu (扈), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Shaanxi province) dating back to the Xia dynasty (2070–1600  BC ) (ii) adopted as a surname by the Hu Di Gan (扈地干) family from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Hoo was born in 1448, in Gatton, Surrey, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Hoo the Elder, was 53 and her mother, Eleanor Welles, was 24. She married Roger Copley in 1465, in Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died about 1535, in Wythenshawe, Lancashire, England, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Hoo est née en 1448, à Gatton, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Hoo the Elder, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Welles, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Copley en 1465, à Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1535, à Wythenshawe, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 88 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Hoo 1448 in Gatton, Surrey, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Hoo the Elder 53 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Welles 24. Sie hat 1465 in Sussex, England Roger Copley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb um 1535 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Wythenshawe, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Hoo è nata il nel 1448 nel Gatton, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Hoo the Elder, aveva 53 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Welles, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Roger Copley nel 1465, nel Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì circa 1535, nel Wythenshawe, Lancashire, England, all'età di 88 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Hooが1448年にイギリスイギリススリーガットオンで生まれた時，父Thomas Hoo the Elderは53歳，母Eleanor Wellesは24歳であった。1465年にイギリススセックスでRoger Copleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1535年にイギリスランカシュアイアウイスエンシャウで88歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Hoo(이)가 1448년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 가턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Hoo the Elder(은)는 53세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Welles(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1465년 영국 수세스에서 Roger Copley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1535년 영국 랭카실르 윈이테쇼에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Hoo nasceu em 1448, em Gatton, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Hoo the Elder, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Welles, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger Copley em 1465, em Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1535, em Wythenshawe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Hoo родилась в 1448 г. в местности гаттон, сурри, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Hoo the Elder было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Welles, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Copley в 1465 г. в местности суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла около 1535 г. в местности витеншав, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 88 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Hoo nació en 1448, en Gatton, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Hoo the Elder, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Eleanor Welles, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Roger Copley en 1465, en Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1535, en Wythenshawe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 88 años.
